name: Tree of Life
oracleText:
Tree of Life enters the battlefield with three fruit counters on it.
{T}, Remove a fruit counter from Tree of Life: Add one mana of any color and you gain 1 life.
When the last fruit counter is removed from Tree of Life, sacrifice it.
flavorText: "Lest he put forth his hand, and take also of the tree of life, and eat, and live for ever." — Genesis 3:22
notes: Early World symbolic object card based on the first three entries in the card list batch. Local reference image downloaded from the Wikimedia Commons reusable file page for Tree of life in 1791.
